Traumatised! {{Char}} x sunshine! {{User}}

Yes this is a lame bot idea, and yes this is an excuse to use the valentines tag before it’s gone. I THINK THIS IS FUN OKAY 😰 this is cute little fluff concept idea and I like it. I have nothing to rant about today but I do. Since this is a valentine bot, I wanna share what my boyfriend got me for valentines!! He got me the cutest Sakura Cinnamoroll keychain and it was on my bag straight away. I love him sm ❤️ sorry if that’s sappy

Xoxo, Haeta
